overrides.expect: v (x) := \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} u (x) & \text {if x_{n} \geq 0} \\ - u (x _ {1}, \ldots , x _ {n - 1}, - x _ {n}) & \text {if x_{n} <   0} \end{array} \right.

u (x, t) := \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 0 & \text {if x <   0} \\ \frac {x}{t} & \text {if 0 <   x <   t} \\ 1 & \text {if t <   x <   1 + \frac {t}{2}} \\ 0 & \text {if x > 1 + \frac {t}{2}} \end{array} \right. (0 \leq t \leq 2).
overrides.new: u (x, t) := \left\{ \begin{array}{ll} 0 & \text{if } x < 0 \\ \frac{x}{t} & \text{if } 0 < x < t \\ 1 & \text{if } t < x < 1 + \frac{t}{2} \\ 0 & \text{if } x > 1 + \frac{t}{2} \end{array} \right. (0 \leq t \leq 2).

overrides.expect: u (x, t) := \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} - \frac {2}{3} \left(t + \sqrt {3 x + t ^ {2}}\right) & \text {if 4x+ t^{2} >0} \\ 0 & \text {if 4x+ t^{2} <  0} \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: u (x, t) := \left\{ \begin{array}{ll} -\frac{2}{3}\left(t + \sqrt{3 x + t^{2}}\right) & \text{if } 4x+ t^{2} > 0 \\ 0 & \text{if } 4x+ t^{2} < 0 \end{array} \right.

overrides.expect: \hat {h} (y) = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} \beta_ {1} (y) (\gamma (y) - d) + \beta_ {2} (y) (- \gamma (y) - d) & \text {if |y|\leq d} \\ \beta_ {1} (y) (i \delta (y) - d) + \beta_ {2} (y) (- i \delta (y) - d) & \text {if |y|\geq d}. \end{array} \right.

\left\{ \begin{array}{l l} \mathbf {u} _ {x _ {n}} ^ {*} = \frac {C r}{r - (x _ {1} + \cdots + x _ {n - 1}) - (u ^ {1 *} + \cdots + u ^ {m *})} \left(\sum_ {j, l} \mathbf {u} _ {x _ {j}} ^ {l *} + 1\right) & \text {for |x| <   r} \\ \mathbf {u} ^ {*} = 0 & \text {for |x^{\prime}| <   r , x_{n} = 0 .} \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: \left\{ \begin{array}{ll} \mathbf{u}_{x_{n}}^{*} = \frac{C r}{r - (x_{1} + \cdots + x_{n - 1}) - (u^{1*} + \cdots + u^{m*})}\left(\sum_{j, l} \mathbf{u}_{x_{j}}^{l*} + 1\right) & \text{for } |x| < r \\ \mathbf{u}^{*} = 0 & \text{for } |x^{\prime}| < r, x_{n}=0. \end{array} \right.

overrides.expect: \text {``D^{\alpha} u = 0 on \partial U'' for all |\alpha|\leq k - 1.}
overrides.new: D^{\alpha} u = 0 \text{ on } \partial U \text{ for all } |\alpha|\leq k - 1.

overrides.expect: \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} u _ {t t} + d u _ {t} - u _ {x x} = f & \text {in (0,1)\times(0,T)} \\ u = 0 & \text {on (\{0\} \times[0,T])\cup(\{1\}\times[0,T])} \\ u = g, u _ {t} = h & \text {on (0,1)\times\{t = 0\}}. \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: \left\{ \begin{array}{ll} u_{t t} + d u_{t} - u_{x x} = f & \text{in } (0,1)\times(0,T) \\ u = 0 & \text{on } (\{0\}\times[0,T])\cup(\{1\}\times[0,T]) \\ u = g, u_{t} = h & \text{on } (0,1)\times\{t = 0\}. \end{array} \right.

overrides.expect: \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} u _ {t t} + u _ {x x x x} = 0 & \text {in (0,1)\times(0,T)} \\ u = u _ {x} = 0 & \text {on (\{0\} \times[0,T])\cup(\{1\}\times[0,T])} \\ u = g, u _ {t} = h & \text {on [0,1]\times\{t = 0\}}. \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: \left\{ \begin{array}{ll} u_{t t} + u_{x x x x} = 0 & \text{in } (0,1)\times(0,T) \\ u = u_{x} = 0 & \text{on } (\{0\}\times[0,T])\cup(\{1\}\times[0,T]) \\ u = g, u_{t} = h & \text{on } [0,1]\times\{t = 0\}. \end{array} \right.

overrides.expect: u (x) <   u (x _ {\lambda}) \text {   for   each   point   } x \in E _ {\lambda}. \tag {15_{\lambda}}
overrides.new: u (x) < u (x_{\lambda}) \text{ for each point } x \in E_{\lambda}. \tag{15\_lambda}
